name: Ring of Skeletal Specters
description: Notes The reactive proc spawns a stationary summon on the player’s position when taking 20+ damage, dealing damage and slowing in a similar vein to the Honeytomb Snare. In practice the proc feels semi-consistent, as many projectiles will deal over 20 damage. For this reason it is most useful on melee classes who will get hit the most and can stay close to the summon.
effects: On Taking Damage: Shots above 20 damage summon hands which slam the ground dealing 150 damage in a radius of 6 squares every second for 3 seconds On enemy: Slowed for 0.8 seconds Cooldown: 8 seconds
